mapper.select: select model_id as modelId, manufacturer, model_name as modelName, battery_capacity_kwh as batteryCapacityKwh, connector_type as connectorType, max_charging_speed_kw as maxChargingSpeedKw, image_url as imageUrl from vehicle_model order by manufacturer, model_name
mapper.insert: insert into vehicle ( member_id, model_id, vehicle_nickname, plate_number, is_default ) values ( #{memberId}, #{modelId}, #{vehicleNickname}, #{plateNumber}, #{isDefault} )
mapper.select:
select v.vehicle_id as vehicleId, v.member_id as memberId, v.model_id as modelId, v.vehicle_nickname as vehicleNickname, v.plate_number as plateNumber, v.is_default as isDefault,
vm.manufacturer, vm.model_name as modelName, vm.battery_capacity_kwh as batteryCapacityKwh, vm.connector_type as connectorType, vm.max_charging_speed_kw as maxChargingSpeedKw, vm.image_url as imageUrl
from vehicle v join vehicle_model vm on v.model_id = vm.model_id where v.member_id = #{memberId} and v.is_deleted = false order by v.is_default desc, v.created_at desc
mapper.update: update vehicle set is_default = false, updated_at = current_timestamp where member_id = #{memberId}
update vehicle set is_deleted = true, is_default = false, deleted_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp where member_id = #{memberId} and vehicle_id = #{vehicleId}
